name: eqemupatcher-electron
author: Valorith
description: Cross-platform Electron launcher for EQEmu patching

scripts.check: node --check src/electron/main.js && node --check src/electron/preload.js && node --check src/electron/backend/launcher-backend.js && node --check src/electron/backend/ui-manager.js && node --check src/electron/backend/launcher-updater.js && node --check src/electron/renderer/patch-notes-state.js && node --check src/electron/renderer/app.js && node --check src/filelistbuilder-electron/main.js && node --check src/filelistbuilder-electron/preload.js && node --check src/filelistbuilder-electron/backend/legacy-filelistbuilder.js && node --check src/filelistbuilder-electron/backend/filelistbuilder-backend.js && node --check src/filelistbuilder-electron/renderer/app.js
scripts.test: node --test test/electron-backend.test.js test/ui-manager-backend.test.js test/launcher-updater.test.js test/filelistbuilder-backend.test.js test/patch-notes-state.test.js test/renderer-app.test.js
